requirements.source_document: 01. NMP58544 - ANNEX A TO ATTACHMENT F - Short Form RFQ and WO.md
requirements.requirement_text: Quotations are to be written in English. All measurements are to be expressed in Australian legal units of measurement unless otherwise specified. Quotations are to include a PDF copy of the Supplier’s Deed of Undertaking in the form attached duly signed by the Supplier. The Supplier must provide its pricing information as a separate attachment to the Quotation, marked ‘Quotation Attachment A – Work Order Price & Payment Arrangements’.

requirements.source_document: 01. NMP58544 - ANNEX A TO ATTACHMENT F - Short Form RFQ and WO.md
requirements.requirement_text: Quotations are to be lodged electronically via AusTender using the Dynamic Sourcing for Panels (DS4P) lodgement page.

requirements.source_document: 01. NMP58544 - ANNEX A TO ATTACHMENT F - Short Form RFQ and WO.md
requirements.requirement_text: The Supplier’s Quotation is to include pricing on the basis of: Fixed Price, Outcome Based T&M (capped at a NTE Price), Time and Materials (T&M) (capped at a NTE Price), Combination of T&M and Fixed Price, Other.

requirements.source_document: 01. NMP58544 - ANNEX A TO ATTACHMENT F - Short Form RFQ and WO.md
requirements.requirement_text: The criteria that the Commonwealth will use to evaluate the Quotation comprises the following: Methodology, Past Performance, Technical Merit, Pricing, Compliance.

requirements.source_document: 01. NMP58544 - ANNEX A TO ATTACHMENT F - Short Form RFQ and WO.md
requirements.requirement_text: The Commonwealth will not enter into a Work Order with a Supplier which has a judicial decision against it relating to unpaid employee entitlements where the entitlements remain unpaid.

requirements.source_document: 01. NMP58544 - ANNEX A TO ATTACHMENT F - Short Form RFQ and WO.md
requirements.requirement_text: In accordance with the Workplace Gender Equality Procurement Principles, the Commonwealth will not enter into a Work Order with a Supplier who is non-compliant under the Workplace Gender Equality Act 2012 (Cth).

requirements.source_document: 01. NMP58544 - ANNEX A TO ATTACHMENT F - Short Form RFQ and WO.md
requirements.requirement_text: Suppliers are solely responsible for examining this RFQ, any documents referenced in or attached to this RFQ and any other information made available by the Commonwealth to Suppliers in connection with the RFQ process.

requirements.source_document: 01. NMP58544 - ANNEX A TO ATTACHMENT F - Short Form RFQ and WO.md
requirements.requirement_text: Suppliers are to direct any questions or concerns regarding this RFQ in writing to the Contact Officer specified in the Quotation Details Schedule.

requirements.source_document: 01. NMP58544 - ANNEX A TO ATTACHMENT F - Short Form RFQ and WO.md
requirements.requirement_text: Quotations are to be lodged electronically via AusTender before the Closing Time in accordance with the Quotation lodgement procedures set out in this RFQ and on AusTender.

requirements.source_document: 01. NMP58544 - ANNEX A TO ATTACHMENT F - Short Form RFQ and WO.md
requirements.requirement_text: The Commonwealth will not consider a Quotation for part of the Services.

requirements.source_document: 02. NMP58544 - ICTPA Schedule A - Statement of Work - eTools and DDM Sustainment Support.md
requirements.requirement_text: The Supplier agrees and acknowledges that the Commonwealth will inform the Supplier, as soon as practicable after each Performance Review, of the Supplier’s Achieved Performance for each KPI for the relevant Review Period and whether the Supplier is required to undertake any course of action in relation to its performance.

requirements.source_document: 02. NMP58544 - ICTPA Schedule A - Statement of Work - eTools and DDM Sustainment Support.md
requirements.requirement_text: The KPIs applicable to this Work Order are set out at Appendix A to this Annexure.

requirements.source_document: 02. NMP58544 - ICTPA Schedule A - Statement of Work - eTools and DDM Sustainment Support.md
requirements.requirement_text: Tenderers are to provide a draft AIC Schedule in accordance with Table 1 below; describe the tenderer’s approach to maximising participation of Australian Industry (where competitive), including local businesses, in their supply chain.

requirements.source_document: 02. NMP58544 - ICTPA Schedule A - Statement of Work - eTools and DDM Sustainment Support.md
requirements.requirement_text: The Supplier agrees and acknowledges that it must complete and submit for Approval either: an AIC Schedule, in the format set out in Annexure F or as otherwise specified by the Commonwealth, if the Work Order value (inclusive of all extensions and variations) including GST is between $4M and $20M; or an AIC Plan, in the format set out in Annexure G or as otherwise specified by the Commonwealth, if the Work Order value (inclusive of all extensions and variations) including GST exceeds $20M.

requirements.source_document: 02. NMP58544 - ICTPA Schedule A - Statement of Work - eTools and DDM Sustainment Support.md
requirements.requirement_text: The Supplier must manage Intellectual Property under this Work Order, including Technical Data and Software rights and restrictions, in accordance with clause 5 of the COD and the Work Order.

requirements.source_document: 02. NMP58544 - ICTPA Schedule A - Statement of Work - eTools and DDM Sustainment Support.md
requirements.requirement_text: The Supplier must provide each Plan in accordance with the COD and as set out in the Work Order and as further specified in this clause 10.

requirements.source_document: 02. NMP58544 - ICTPA Schedule A - Statement of Work - eTools and DDM Sustainment Support.md
requirements.requirement_text: The Supplier must attend Performance Reviews for this Work Order on a monthly basis during the Work Order Term to assess and discuss the Supplier’s performance against Performance Measures as outlined in the Performance Reports.

requirements.source_document: 02. NMP58544 - ICTPA Schedule A - Statement of Work - eTools and DDM Sustainment Support.md
requirements.requirement_text: The Supplier must provide the reports in accordance with this clause 13. The reports must be in a format and utilising a delivery method as agreed between the parties, or, absent such agreement, in a form specified by the Commonwealth.

requirements.source_document: 02. NMP58544 - ICTPA Schedule A - Statement of Work - eTools and DDM Sustainment Support.md
requirements.requirement_text: In addition to the standards referred to in clause 3.3 of the COD and/or the policy requirements set out in clause 12.3 of the COD, the Supplier must comply with the following additional policies, standards, guidelines, frameworks, procedures, or other resources in the table below.

requirements.source_document: 02. NMP58544 - ICTPA Schedule A - Statement of Work - eTools and DDM Sustainment Support.md
requirements.requirement_text: Without limiting clause 3.4 of the COD, the Supplier must demonstrate full compliance with the Digital Service Standard in accordance with the clause 3.4 of the COD and the table below, including providing progress reports as requested by the Commonwealth.
